activities.name: Update Last 2 months Balance
activities.description: Update last 2 months balance amount in CubeSW_SUMM_ERP_GL_Tran_Stage table

dependsOn.activity: Cpy CubeSW SUMM ERP GL Stage Load

scripts.text:
Update Out.CUBESW_SUMM_ERP_GL_TRANSACTION_STAGE set BalanceAMount=T1.BalanceAmount 
from 
Out.CUBESW_SUMM_ERP_GL_TRANSACTION_STAGE T Join (
Select 
			Eomonth(concat(substring(finperiodid,1,charindex('-',finperiodid)),'01-',substring(finperiodid,charindex('-',finperiodid)+1,len(finperiodid)))) AS FIN_MONTH,
			AccountCOde,
			AccounTClass,
			AccounTDescription,
			BranchCode,
			FinPeriodID,
			LedgerID,
			SUM(BalanceAmount) BalanceAMount
			from OUT.CUBESW_ERP_GL_TRANSACTION_STAGE
			WHERE  AccountCode<'60000'  
			and Eomonth(concat(substring(finperiodid,1,charindex('-',finperiodid)),'01-',substring(finperiodid,charindex('-',finperiodid)+1,len(finperiodid))))>=Dateadd(M,-6,Getdate())
			Group by 
		Eomonth(concat(substring(finperiodid,1,charindex('-',finperiodid)),'01-',substring(finperiodid,charindex('-',finperiodid)+1,len(finperiodid)))),
		AccountCode,
		AccountClass,
		AccountDescription,
		BranchCode,
		FinPeriodID,
		LedgerID ) T1
		On T.AccountCode=T1.AccountCode and
			T.BranchCode=T1.BranchCode and
			T.FinperiodID=T1.FInperiodId and
			T.LedgerID=T1.LedgerID
			Where T.AccountCode<'60000'

activities.name: Cpy CubeSW SUMM ERP GL Stage Load
activities.description: Insert new records into CubeSW_SUMM_ERP_GL_transaction table

source.sqlReaderQuery:
Select 
	Eomonth(concat(substring(A.finperiodid,1,charindex('-',A.finperiodid)),'01-',substring(A.finperiodid,charindex('-',A.finperiodid)+1,len(A.finperiodid)))) As CalendarDate,
	A.AccountCode,
	A.AccountClass,
	A.AccountDescription,
	A.BranchCode,
	A.FinperiodID,
	A.LedgerID,
	0 AS BalanceAmount,
	'New' AS Flag,
	'ETLAdmin' CreatedBy,
	Getdate() as CreatedDateTime,
	Getdate() AS LastModifiedDateTime
from 
(
	Select 
		AccountCode,
		AccountClass,
		AccountDescription,
		BRANCHCode,
		FinPeriodID,
		LedgerID,
		Sum(BalanceAmount) As BalanceAmount
			from OUT.CUBESW_ERP_GL_TRANSACTION_STAGE
			WHERE  AccountCode<'60000'  
			
		GROUP BY  
		AccountCode,
		AccountClass,
		AccountDescription,
		BRANCHCode,
		FinPeriodID,
		LedgerID 
) A Left Join OUT.CUBESW_SUMM_ERP_GL_TRANSACTION_STAGE B
On A.AccountCode=B.AccountCode and
   A.BranchCode=B.BranchCode and 
   A.Finperiodid=B.FInperiodID and
   A.LedgerID=B.LedgerID

Where B.AccountCode is null and B.BranchCode is null and B.FinperiodID is null and B.LedgerID is null

activities.name: Insert CurrentMon records
activities.description:
Delete and insert current month entries in  
OUT.CUBESW_SUMM_ERP_GL_TRANSACTION_STAGE

scripts.text:
Delete from OUT.CUBESW_SUMM_ERP_GL_TRANSACTION_STAGE
Where CalendarDate=Eomonth(Getdate());

Insert into OUT.CUBESW_SUMM_ERP_GL_TRANSACTION_STAGE
Select 
Distinct EOMONTH(GETDATE()) as CalendarDate,
	     AccountCode,
		 AccountClass,
		 AccountDescription,
		 BranchCode,
		 Format(Getdate(),'MM-yyyy') AS FinperiodID,
		 LedgerID,
		 0 AS BalanceAmount,
		 'New' AS Flag,
		 'ETLAdmin' CreatedBy,
		 Getdate() as CreatedDateTime,
		 Getdate() AS LastModifiedDateTime
from OUT.CUBESW_SUMM_ERP_GL_TRANSACTION_STAGE
;

With T_GL As (
	Select * ,
		Row_number() over(Partition by AccountCode,BranchCode,LedgerID order by 
		Eomonth(concat(substring(finperiodid,1,charindex('-',finperiodid)),'01-',substring(finperiodid,charindex('-',finperiodid)+1,len(finperiodid))))
						 ) AS RowNum
		From (
			Select Distinct
				AccountCode,
				AccountClass,
				AccountDescription,
				BRANCHCode,
				FinPeriodID,
				Eomonth(concat(substring(finperiodid,1,charindex('-',finperiodid)),'01-',substring(finperiodid,charindex('-',finperiodid)+1,len(finperiodid)))) As CalendarDate,
				LedgerID
					from OUT.CUBESW_ERP_GL_TRANSACTION_STAGE
					WHERE  AccountCode<'60000'  
        	 ) A

),
T_DummyTran AS (
	Select	DIstinct C.CalendarDate,T.AccountCode, T.AccountClass,T.AccountDescription,T.BranchCode,T.FinPeriodID,T.LedgerID
		from 
		( Select distinct Eomonth(CalendarDate) as CalendarDate,Month, Year from EDW.DIM_calendar ) C Left Join T_GL T
				On C.CalendarDate >= T.CalendarDate  And C.CalendarDate <= Eomonth(Getdate()) and T.Rownum=1
		 Where C.CalendarDate >=T.CalendarDate And  C.CalendarDate <= Eomonth(Getdate())
)
Insert into OUT.CUBESW_SUMM_ERP_GL_TRANSACTION_STAGE
Select D.CalendarDate,D.AccountCode,D.AccountClass,D.AccountDescription,D.BranchCode,Format(D.CalendarDate,'MM-yyyy') as FinperiodID,D.LedgerID, 
		0 as BalanceAmount,
		'New' AS Flag,
		 'ETLAdmin' CreatedBy,
		 Getdate() as CreatedDateTime,
		 Getdate() AS LastModifiedDateTime
from T_DummyTran D Left Join OUT.CUBESW_SUMM_ERP_GL_Transaction_stage SS  
			 on  D.AccountCode  =SS.AccountCode and
				 D.BranchCode   =SS.BranchCode  and 
				 D.CalendarDate =SS.Calendardate and
				 D.LedgerID     =SS.LedgerID
				 where   SS.AccountCode   Is NULL and
						 SS.BranchCode    Is NULL and
						 SS.CalendarDate  Is NULL and
						 SS.LedgerID      Is NULL ;

activities.name: Update Bal for GL exceptions
activities.description: Update balance for transaction exceptions for which Account, branch, ledger ID and fin period is not exist in GL

scripts.text:
Update  OUT.CubeSW_SUMM_ERP_GL_Transaction_stage set
BalanceAmount=0
From 
	OUT.CubeSW_SUMM_ERP_GL_Transaction_stage S left Join 
	( Select  AccountCode, BranchCode, LedgerID, FinperiodID, sum(BalanceAmount) as BalanceAmount FROM EDW.FACT_ERP_GL_transaction 
		where Posted='1' 
		Group by AccountCode, BranchCode, LedgerID, FinperiodID
	) F
	on 
		S.AccountCode = F.AccountCode and 
		S.BranchCode  = F.BranchCode and 
		S.LedgerID    = F.LedgerID   and 
		S.FinperiodID = F.FinperiodID 
 Where  S.Calendardate>=Dateadd(M,-6,Getdate()) and 
 		S.BalanceAmount<>0 and 
		F.AccountCode is NULL and 
		F.BranchCode  is NULL and 
		F.LedgerID    is NULL and 
		F.FinperiodID is NULL ;

/*Update  OUT.CUbeSW_ERP_GL_Transaction set BalanceAmount=0
	From 
		OUT.CUbeSW_ERP_GL_Transaction C left Join 
		( Select  AccountCode, BranchCode, LedgerID, FinperiodID, sum(BalanceAmount) as BalanceAmount FROM OUT.CUbeSW_SUMM_ERP_GL_Transaction_STAGE
					Group by AccountCode, BranchCode, LedgerID, FinperiodID
		) S
		on 
			C.AccountCode = S.AccountCode and 
			C.BranchCode  = S.BranchCode and 
			C.LedgerID    = S.LedgerID   and 
			C.FinperiodID = S.FinperiodID 
 Where  C.AccountCode<'60000' and 
		Eomonth(concat(substring(C.finperiodid,1,charindex('-',C.finperiodid)),'01-',substring(C.finperiodid,charindex('-',C.finperiodid)+1,len(C.finperiodid)))) >=Dateadd(M,-6,Getdate()) and 
		C.BalanceAmount<>0 and 
		S.AccountCode is NULL and 
		S.BranchCode  is NULL and 
		S.LedgerID    is NULL and 
		S.FinperiodID is NULL  

*/
Update  OUT.CUbeSW_ERP_GL_Transaction_New set BalanceAmount=0
	From 
		OUT.CUbeSW_ERP_GL_Transaction_New C left Join 
		( Select  AccountCode, BranchCode, LedgerID, FinperiodID, sum(BalanceAmount) as BalanceAmount FROM OUT.CUbeSW_SUMM_ERP_GL_Transaction_STAGE
					Group by AccountCode, BranchCode, LedgerID, FinperiodID
		) S
		on 
			C.AccountCode = S.AccountCode and 
			C.BranchCode  = S.BranchCode and 
			C.LedgerID    = S.LedgerID   and 
			C.FinperiodID = S.FinperiodID 
 Where  C.AccountCode<'60000' and Eomonth(concat(substring(C.finperiodid,1,charindex('-',C.finperiodid)),'01-',substring(C.finperiodid,charindex('-',C.finperiodid)+1,len(C.finperiodid)))) >=Dateadd(M,-6,Getdate()) and 
		C.BalanceAmount<>0 and 
		S.AccountCode is NULL and 
		S.BranchCode  is NULL and 
		S.LedgerID    is NULL and 
		S.FinperiodID is NULL 


Update  OUT.CUbeSW_ERP_GL_Transaction_New set BalanceAmount=0
	From 
		OUT.CUbeSW_ERP_GL_Transaction_New C left Join 
		( Select  AccountCode, BranchCode, LedgerID, FinperiodID,DepartmentID,ProductID,MarketingAccountID, sum(BalanceAmount) as BalanceAmount 
		FROM OUT.CUbeSW_ERP_GL_Transaction_STAGE
			Group by AccountCode, BranchCode, LedgerID, FinperiodID,DepartmentID,ProductID,MarketingAccountID
		) S
		on 
			C.AccountCode = S.AccountCode and 
			C.BranchCode  = S.BranchCode and 
			C.LedgerID    = S.LedgerID   and 
			C.FinperiodID = S.FinperiodID and
			C.DepartmentID = S.DepartmentID and
			C.ProductID = S.ProductID and
			C.MarketingAccountID = S.MarketingAccountID
 Where  C.AccountCode>='60000' and Eomonth(concat(substring(C.finperiodid,1,charindex('-',C.finperiodid)),'01-',substring(C.finperiodid,charindex('-',C.finperiodid)+1,len(C.finperiodid)))) >=Dateadd(M,-6,Getdate()) and 
		C.BalanceAmount<>0 and 
		S.AccountCode is NULL and 
		S.BranchCode  is NULL and 
		S.LedgerID    is NULL and 
		S.FinperiodID is NULL and
		S.DepartmentID is NULL and
		S.ProductID is NULL and
		S.MarketingAccountID is NULL

activities.name: Remove Duplicates from Stage
activities.description: Remove duplicates  from Stage where Accountcode>=60000

scripts.text:
WITH CTE as
(
    SELECT *, row_num = ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                PARTITION BY GL_LINE_KEY
                ORDER BY (SELECT NULL)
                )
    FROM OUT.CUbeSW_ERP_GL_Transaction_STAGE
    where  --AccountCode>='60000' and 
    GL_LINE_KEY in 
    (
        SELECT [GL_LINE_KEY]
        FROM OUT.CUbeSW_ERP_GL_Transaction_STAGE
		--Where AccountCode>='60000'
        group by 
        [GL_LINE_KEY]
        having count(1) > 1
    )
)
DELETE FROM cte
WHERE row_num > 1;
